goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'museum' and should be in the 'west'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'leverton house'.
Make sure you get 'whether they have internet'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
